nasb.text: who, although He existed in the form of God, did not regard equality with God a thing to be grasped,

esv.text: who, though he was in the form of God, did not count equality with God a thing to be grasped,

cnv.text: 他本來有　神的形象，卻不堅持自己與　神平等的地位，

ccb.text: 祂虽然本质上是上帝， 却没有紧紧抓住自己与上帝平等的地位不放，

csbs.text: 虽然他就是神本体的存在， 却不把与神同等看做是一件要强抓不放的事，
